violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. A box of potatoes was stored on the floor under the counter across from the dish storage.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw whole beef cut was stored where onions were under a portion of the raw beef. This was in the cooler across from the slicer.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. A wet wiping cloth was stored on the counter across from the pizza cooler. Needs to be stored in sanitizer when not in use.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food(prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Container of deli meat, hamburger patties, cut vegetables, cooked rice, and cooked pasta in the refrigerators and prep cooler were not dated.
